# Guerreiro Grappling

Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, MMA, and Kickboxing gym located in Gillitts, Durban, South Africa.

## Core Information
- **Location**: Entrance in, 6 Old Main Road, Gillitts Hamilton Park, Hamilton Cres, Gillitts, Durban, 3610.
- **Service Areas**: Gillitts, Kloof, Hillcrest, Winston Park, Waterfall, Durban North.
- **Gym Type**: BJJ Academy, Combat Sports Gym, Martial Arts School.
- **Phone**: +27 82 495 7760
- **Website**: https://guerreirograppling.co.za
- **Established**: 2024 (MMXXIV)

## Programs & Pricing
- **Kids BJJ (Ages 4-7)**: R500/month. Focus on coordination, balance, and discipline.
- **Teens Grappling (Ages 7-14)**: R600/month. Focus on self-defense, confidence, and anti-bullying.
- **Adult MMA**: R600/month. Focus on fundamentals, striking, takedowns, and clinching.
- **Adult BJJ**: R800/month. Focus on Gi and No-Gi ground control and submissions.
- **All Inclusive Pass**: R1,000/month. Access to every class (BJJ, MMA, Kickboxing).

## Coaching Team
- **Josh Pretorius**: Head Coach (BJJ & MMA).
- **Annabelle Slabbert**: Coach (BJJ).
- **Juanita Patten**: Coach (Nomad Jiu Jitsu).

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
- **Is BJJ for all ages?** Yes, BJJ uses leverage so anybody of any age can excel.
- **MMA vs BJJ?** Pure BJJ has no strikes; it focuses on ground control and joint manipulation.
- **Is it safe?** BJJ is one of the safest martial arts as it eliminates striking to focus on controlled technique.
- **How often should I train?** 3 times a week is the "sweet spot" for most improvements and recovery.
- **Rules?** No striking, eye gouging, or hair pulling in BJJ.

## Core Values
Guerreiro Grappling focuses on Technical Precision, Adaptive Strength, and Kinetic Mastery. Training provides benefits in weight loss, cardiovascular health, self-defense, and community.
